title: Russia offers China energy lifeline as the Iran war strangles global supply
summary_full: "Russia can certainly fill the resource gap that has arisen in China," Russian foreign minister Sergei Lavrov said Wednesday.
summary_public: "Russia can certainly fill the resource gap that has arisen in China," Russian foreign minister Sergei Lavrov said Wednesday.
